title: Imparfait for habits: avant, chaque jour
subtitle: Talk about what used to happen.
duolingoBridge: A2 often asks you to compare past habits with now.
overview: Knowledge point 1: imparfait describes repeated actions in the past.
Knowledge point 2: use markers like avant, souvent, tous les jours.

sections.title: Past habit map
rows: I used to work / I was working

items.fr: Avant, je prenais le bus tous les jours.
items.en: Before, I used to take the bus every day.
items.es: Antes tomaba el autobús todos los días.

items.fr: Quand j’étais enfant, je lisais beaucoup.
items.en: When I was a child, I used to read a lot.

items.fr: Nous mangions souvent chez mes parents.
items.en: We often ate at my parents’ house.
items.es: Comíamos a menudo en casa de mis padres.

items.en: She used to work in the evening.

items.fr: Avant, je ne parlais pas français.
items.en: Before, I did not speak French.
